reasoning: User asks for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku. Akita is appropriate, but returned items (museums, toll booth, archaeological sites, shrines) have no cherry-blossom relevance and are unranked by sakura association.
missing_data: Famous Akita sakura spots (Kakunodate, Hirosaki/Aomori adjacent, Kitakami) are absent or buried. No bloom-period metadata or category tag.
improvement_hint: Add seasonal/feature tags (sakura, kōyō) so get_spots can filter or boost; expose theme=sakura facet.

reasoning: User asks for sake breweries in Niigata. get_local_specialty returns MAFF GI items (edamame, carrots, lotus root) — no sake breweries. Wrong tool/data scope; sake brewery list not retrievable here.
missing_data: Major Niigata kura (Hakkaisan, Kubota/Asahi Shuzo, Hakurakusei, Kikusui, etc.) — no brewery dataset.
improvement_hint: Add a sake-brewery dataset (NTA list / Niigata Sake Brewers Assoc) and a get_breweries tool or sake category.

reasoning: Hakuba ski+onsen query, but response returns museum, garden, and municipal-page nav items (kankō-ka, tourism dept) with no ski/onsen properties.
missing_data: Hakuba ski resorts (Happo-One, Goryu, Iwatake) and onsen (Hakuba Happo Onsen, Mimizuku). Activity/category fields.
improvement_hint: Filter out municipal-page chrome (department names) from get_spots; add facility category (ski_resort, onsen).

reasoning: Kansai kōyō query, Kyoto-only call. Kyoto data is real but ranked by ID, not by autumn-foliage relevance — Tofukuji, Eikando, Arashiyama not surfaced top-of-list.
missing_data: Famous kōyō spots (Tofuku-ji, Eikan-dō, Kiyomizu-dera, Arashiyama). Other Kansai prefectures (Nara, Shiga, Hyogo).
improvement_hint: Add seasonal-feature tag and prominence-by-theme ranking; expose multi-prefecture region queries.

reasoning: Nara cherry-blossom query (Arabic). Returns real Nara assets (Nara Park, Kasugayama, Takatori Castle) — some are sakura-relevant but no explicit sakura ranking. Yoshino-yama (most famous Nara sakura) not visible in shown slice.
missing_data: Yoshinoyama, Mt Yoshino sakura specifically. Sakura-feature tag.
improvement_hint: Surface Yoshino-yama with sakura tag; add seasonal_feature filter.

reasoning: User asks for stargazing spots on remote Okinawa islands. Response: castles, parks, theme park — none with stargazing/dark-sky context, and no remote-island filter applied (Iriomote, Hateruma absent from shown).
missing_data: Ishigaki Iriomote NP dark-sky area, Hateruma, Kohama, Taketomi. Stargazing/dark-sky tag.
improvement_hint: Add island-vs-mainland filter and dark-sky/stargazing theme tag (Bisei-style).

reasoning: Thai query asks rural Hokkaido onsen ryokan. Response returns Sapporo city hotels (Holiday Inn, Crowne Plaza) and Niseko apartments — no rural/onsen filter. lodging_type field exists but ryokan/onsen results not prioritized.
missing_data: Noboribetsu, Jozankei, Lake Akan, Sounkyo onsen ryokan. Rural area indicator.
improvement_hint: Filter by lodging_type=onsen_ryokan and add rural-vs-city flag (population_density).

reasoning: Setouchi islands query (Vietnamese). Kagawa returns Naoshima/Shodoshima assets (Lee Ufan, Chichu Art Museum, Angel Road) and Ritsurin/Kotohira-gu — partly relevant. But query is region-wide; Hiroshima/Okayama/Ehime islands missing.
missing_data: Naoshima/Teshima/Shodoshima as island entities. Cross-prefecture Setouchi region call.
improvement_hint: Add region-level (Setouchi) query and an 'island' typology field.

reasoning: User asks for indigo-dyeing workshops in Tokushima. METI craft list returns Awa Shijira (woven), Otani Ware, Awa Washi — Awa Indigo Washi is mentioned but actual aizome workshops/aiya not surfaced. Workshop venues not in dataset.
missing_data: Awa-ai (indigo) workshop venues (Aizumi-cho, Furusho-zome, Aiya). Hands-on experience indicator.
improvement_hint: Add experience/workshop dataset linked to crafts (kougeihin → studios).

reasoning: German query for Koyasan shukubo. Response: Tanabe hotels, Wakayama House, Kushimoto business hotel — no Koyasan temple lodgings. lodging_type=temple/shukubo absent.
missing_data: Koyasan shukubo (Ekoin, Fukuchi-in, Saizenin, etc.). Shukubo lodging_type.
improvement_hint: Add lodging_type=shukubo and curate Koyasan temple stays from official tourist board.

reasoning: search_area for 武家屋敷 returns 87 results including real samurai districts (Matsue, Fukui Uchiyama, Aizu, Kanazawa Nagamachi). Good groundedness. But ranking buries best-known (Kakunodate, Hagi) and includes irrelevant pages (Saga overview, Kyoto-warlord).
missing_data: Kakunodate (Akita), Hagi (Yamaguchi), Chiran (Kagoshima) — top samurai-district picks.
improvement_hint: Improve search_area ranking to penalize generic prefecture overview pages.

reasoning: Indonesian query for Akita summer matsuri. count=3 (Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate, Tsuchizaki). Tsuchizaki Shinmei is correct; Kanto Matsuri (most famous Akita summer fest) absent. national_heritage list bleeds non-Akita items.
missing_data: Kanto Matsuri (Akita), Omagari hanabi, Nebuta-related summer dates.
improvement_hint: Add Kanto Matsuri/major summer matsuri dataset; constrain national_heritage to prefecture or label clearly.

reasoning: Korean query: small port towns in San'in. Response: Gassantoda Castle, Yurahime Shrine, Iwami Ginzan — castles/mines/shrines, no port-town filter (Mihonoseki, Sakaiminato).
missing_data: Mihonoseki, Sakaiminato, Hamada port towns. settlement_type=port-town tag.
improvement_hint: Add settlement-type classification (fishing-village, port-town) so filter is possible.

reasoning: User asks where to experience washi making in Gifu. Craft list shows Mino-yaki, Hidehira-nuri, Hida Shunkei — Mino washi (the relevant craft) is not visible in shown slice. No workshop/experience venues.
missing_data: Mino washi (kougeihin) and Mino Washi-no-Sato Hall hands-on workshop.
improvement_hint: Add workshop venues linked to each craft id (kougeihin → studio mapping).

reasoning: Spanish query for Noto Peninsula fishing villages. Response is Kanazawa-centric (museums, Kenroku-en, Oyama Shrine) — no Noto fishing villages (Wajima, Suzu, Sosogi).
missing_data: Wajima Asaichi, Sosogi village, Suzu, Noto-cho fishing communities. Settlement-type tagging.
improvement_hint: Add municipality-level Noto filter and settlement-type field; rank by Noto-peninsula geography.

reasoning: search 砂丘 returns 80 results but mostly Tottori-themed pages (which user explicitly excluded), Kagawa Ritsurin/Saga overview/Yamagata, including the GI Tottori-sakyu rakkyo. Lesser-known dunes (Nakatajima, Naima) not visible.
missing_data: Nakatajima Sand Dunes (Shizuoka), Naima sand dunes (Aomori/Saga), Kotobikihama. Negative-keyword filtering.
improvement_hint: Support negative keywords ('not Tottori') and entity-level dune dataset.

reasoning: Chinese query for San'in traditional crafts. Returns 4 Shimane METI crafts (Iwami-yaki, Sekishu washi, Unshu soroban, Izumo stone lantern) with full Chinese translations — well-targeted. Only Shimane shown; Tottori not included.
missing_data: Tottori crafts (Inshu washi, Yumihama-gasuri) for full San'in coverage.
improvement_hint: Allow region-level (San'in) calls combining multiple prefectures.

reasoning: User asks Hokkaido lavender beyond Furano. Response: Sapporo Beer Museum, Clock Tower, Shikisai-no-oka (relevant!), Hakodate museums, Kushiro Wetland — Shikisai-no-oka is a hit but mostly off-topic; no flower-farm tag.
missing_data: Tomita Farm (Furano excluded), Saika no Sato, Choei Lavender Farm, Hokuryu sunflower fields. Flower-feature tag.

reasoning: Filipino query for traditional COFFEE towns in Kyushu — appears to be query/intent mistranslation; even read as 'old town', Oita-only call returns Beppu Tower, Rakutenchi amusement park, African Safari, aquarium — none are old towns. Hita/Yufuin missing.

reasoning: Japanese query: Hokuriku kominka stays. Response: student housing (!), AB Hotel, ANA Crowne Plaza, Kanaya guesthouse — no kominka/traditional-house lodging filter applied. 'Student housing' is not even valid lodging.
missing_data: Kominka stays in Kanazawa Higashichaya, Wajima, Gokayama. lodging_type=kominka field.
